nodes.label: AI as research and synthesis tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI gathers all this information and makes a determination

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: We accept it as fact unless it is obviously wrong

nodes.label: Clinical judgment as human domain
nodes.grounding_span: Human insight is needed to validate the final numbers

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: Something that takes AI seconds could take me much longer

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner in patient care
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to use it more collaboratively in the future

nodes.label: Patient care quality and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: It is important that we are accurate

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I appreciate the additional time it affords me to do other tasks

nodes.label: Human touch in healthcare
nodes.grounding_span: there will always need to be a human aspect in patient care

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I usually feel satisfied with AI usage

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: We accept it as fact unless it is obviously wrong

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to use it more collaboratively in the future

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: It bothers some that AI will take over our job

nodes.label: Pragmatic validation — accepts AI output unless obviously wrong
nodes.grounding_span: We accept it as fact unless it is obviously wrong

nodes.label: Holistic patient assessment — integrates data with human interaction
nodes.grounding_span: someone may look great on paper, but if you talk to them or assess them personally, you may find out they are sicker
